name: JOHN DOE
summary: Versatile Full-Stack Developer with over 3 years of professional experience in building scalable web and mobile applications using Python, FastAPI, Django, Flask, and Node.js. Experienced with frontend frameworks including React and Flutter. Skilled in PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, Git, and collaborative development.

experience.title: Python Developer
bullets: Architected and developed modular backend services handling multi-stage workflow engines and financial transaction processing for enterprise clients.
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs using FastAPI and Django, ensuring secure, scalable, and high-performance backend services.
Optimized PostgreSQL and MongoDB databases through efficient schema design, indexing, and query tuning, improving overall system performance.
Collaborated with frontend teams to integrate Flutter and React applications with backend APIs, enabling seamless web and mobile experiences.
Containerized applications and automated deployments using Docker, enhancing development efficiency and environment consistency.
Implemented comprehensive unit and integration testing using Pytest, ensuring code quality, reliability, and early detection of regressions.

experience.title: Python Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Developed responsive web applications using Django and Flask, adhering to modern UI/UX design principles.
Built and maintained RESTful APIs using Django REST Framework, enabling efficient client-server communication.
Enhanced application performance through code refactoring, debugging, and query tuning.
Implemented automated unit tests with Pytest, improving overall test coverage and ensuring reliable feature releases.

professional_projects.name: Enterprise Management System
professional_projects.subtitle: | New York | Remote
professional_projects.tech_stack: FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, Firebase, Google Maps API
bullets: Built a full-stack management platform handling end-to-end lifecycle - registration, fee processing, multi-stage tracking, and scheduling.
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs for domain entities including billing, session reconciliation, and recurring payments.
Developed interactive dashboards with real-time push notifications via Firebase.
Implemented role-based access control and built automated reports (PDF/Excel) for financial summaries and operational analytics.

professional_projects.name: Logistics Distribution Platform
professional_projects.subtitle: | New York | Onsite
professional_projects.tech_stack: FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, Google Maps API
bullets: Executed a complete platform migration including codebase refactoring and data migration, ensuring system integrity and data consistency.
Developed RESTful APIs to integrate a mobile application with the backend for real-time order, delivery, and payment synchronization.
Implemented Google Maps API integration for vehicle tracking, enabling real-time route visualization and distance calculation.

personal_projects.name: AI Chatbot Platform
personal_projects.subtitle: | Personal Project
bullets: Built a production-ready chatbot platform using FastAPI, React, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL with clean architecture.
Implemented secure JWT authentication with refresh tokens, role-based access, and session management.
Designed modular APIs, WebSocket-based streaming, and deployed via Docker Compose for scalable environments.

personal_projects.name: Python REST API Framework
personal_projects.subtitle: | Open Source
bullets: Designed and published a decorator-based REST API framework for Python, enabling a FastAPI-like developer experience.
Built standardized JSON response handling, automatic serialization, and exception mapping for consistent API behavior.
Integrated OpenAPI 3.0 specification generation with interactive Swagger UI for automatic API documentation.

languages: English - Native  |  Spanish - Professional Working Proficiency
